nasb.text: Then he gave orders to the centurion for him to be kept in custody and yet have some freedom, and not to prevent any of his friends from ministering to him.

esv.text: Then he gave orders to the centurion that he should be kept in custody but have some liberty, and that none of his friends should be prevented from attending to his needs.

cnv.text: 於是吩咐百夫長看守保羅，但要寬待他，不可阻止親友來照料他。

ccb.text: 他派百夫长看守保罗，给他一定的自由，也允许亲友来供应他的需要。

csbs.text: 他吩咐百夫长看守保罗，要宽待他，不要阻止他自己的人来供应他。
